items.name: MecchaRamba
items.description: MecchaRamba is a complete hack tool for MECCHA CHAMELEON – the viral hide-and-seek game that took Steam by storm with over 10 million copies sold and 340,000 concurrent players. This tool gives you full control with ESP, aimbot, fly hack, teleport, god mode, infinite paint, and more. Dominate every match and become the ultimate chameleon!

items.description: Свой лаунчер для Minecraft-сервера без кода: конструктор .exe-лаунчера с модами и автообновлением, сайт, донат-магазин, RCON. No-code Minecraft server launcher builder.

items.name: clawdmeter-plus

items.name: RAVEL-VB-beachvolleyball-tracking
items.description: • RAVEL-VB is a compact OpenVINO-powered model for detecting and tracking players and the ball in volleyball videos. It uses dynamic region proposals, temporal association, and persistent region vectors, providing standalone CPU inference, JSON predictions, and annotated video rendering.

items.name: code-humanizer
items.description: humanizer, but for code — an agent skill that removes AI-generated code slop: duplicated helpers, try-import fallbacks, broad excepts, speculative abstractions. Test-gated, behavior-preserving.

items.name: resume-project-miner
items.description: Evidence-first Codex Skill for mining Git repositories into truthful Chinese resume and interview materials

items.name: claude-code-skills
items.description: Collection of Claude Code skills for AI workflow optimization

items.name: CET_Complaint_Callstack_Spoofing
items.description: A proof of concept that makes a Windows syscall look like it came from a legitimate Windows thread pool, with no trace of your own code anywhere in the call stack. It also stays compliant with Intel CET (Control-flow Enforcement Technology), which is the hardware feature that kills most naive stack spoofing tricks.

items.name: Claude-Cowork-Game-Studio
items.description: I have just finished customizing a skill set for Claude, designed to enable solo game studio development. The core purpose of these skills is to fix the "vague brief → 60% quality output → endless back-and-forth" loop. The environment is built on Claude Projects (using "Claude Cowork")

items.name: kimi-usage
items.description: Kimi Code CLI plugin: per-turn token usage & cache hit rate in the terminal title bar (zero context cost)

items.name: scrapewright
items.description: LLM-powered web scraping platform. Build reusable scraping services as step-graph state machines via an AI-guided wizard, expose them through a local   HTTP API. Chrome Extension (MV3) + Node.js native messaging host. Data never leaves your machine.

items.name: OntologyDrivenSmartCampusAdvisor
items.description: 本体驱动的简单demo，基于知识图谱的智能校园课程与职业规划顾问。通过本体建模 + 规则推理 + 自然语言问答，为学生提供选课建议、职业规划、技能缺口分析等服务，并完整可视化每一步推理路径。
